recommendations.title: Breakout
recommendations.overview: A bush pilot is hired for $50,000 to go to Mexico to free an innocent prisoner.

recommendations.title: Breakheart Pass
recommendations.overview: At the height of the frontier era, a train races through the Rocky Mountains on a classified mission to a remote army post. But one by one the passengers are being murdered, and their only hope is the mysterious John Deakin, who's being transported t

recommendations.title: Will Penny
recommendations.overview: Will Penny, an aging cowpoke, takes a job on a ranch which requires him to ride the line of the property looking for trespassers or, worse, squatters. He finds that his cabin in the high mountains has been appropriated by a woman whose guide to Orego

recommendations.title: The Great Escape
recommendations.overview: The Nazis, exasperated at the number of escapes from their prison camps by a relatively small number of Allied prisoners, relocate them to a high-security 'escape-proof' camp to sit out the remainder of the war. Undaunted, the prisoners plan one of t

recommendations.title: Little Big Man
recommendations.overview: Jack Crabb, looking back from extreme old age, tells of his life being raised by Indians and fighting with General Custer.

recommendations.title: A Genius, Two Friends, and an Idiot
recommendations.overview: Expert conman Joe Thanks teams up with half-breed Bill and naive Lucy to steal $300,000 from the Indian-hating Major Cabot. Their elaborate plan is full of disguises, double-crosses, and chases, but Joe always seems to know what he's doing.

recommendations.title: Broken Arrow
recommendations.overview: Indian scout Tom Jeffords is sent out to stem the war between the American settlers and Apaches in the late 1870s Arizona. He learns that the Indians kill only to protect themselves, or out of retaliation for white atrocities.

recommendations.title: The Searchers
recommendations.overview: As a Civil War veteran spends years searching for a young niece captured by Indians, his motivation becomes increasingly questionable.

recommendations.title: Rome, Open City
recommendations.overview: During the Nazi occupation of 1944 Rome, Resistance leader Giorgio Manfredi is pursued by the Nazis as he seeks refuge and a means of escape.

recommendations.title: Chato's Land
recommendations.overview: In 1870s New Mexico, a half-breed kills a bigoted sheriff in self-defense but the posse that eventually hunts him finds itself in dangerous territory.
